Home/Industries/Manufacturing & Production

Manufacturing & Production

Optimizing production costs and supply chains for Nepal's industrial backbone.

Sector ExpertCost Audit
Barcode/QRInventory
Excise/VATCompliance
Cement to FMCGReach

Artha Advisory supports Nepal's industrial growth by providing specialized financial oversight and strategic tax planning. From large-scale cement factories to pharmaceutical units, we ensure operational efficiency and regulatory compliance.

🏭 Operational Excellence ​

1. Cost Audit & Efficiency ​

In a competitive market, margin management is critical.

  • Cost Audit: Analyzing the "Cost of Production" per unit to identify wastage and improve gross margins.
  • Yield Analysis: Verifying input-output ratios (Raw Material to Finished Goods) to detect pilferage.
  • Overhead Allocation: Ensuring factory overheads are correctly absorbed into product costing.

2. Supply Chain & Inventory ​

Inventory is often a manufacturer's largest asset—and biggest risk.

  • Perpetual Inventory System: Implementing barcode-based tracking for real-time stock visibility.
  • Stock Audit: Surprise physical verification of high-value raw materials and WIP.
  • Vendor Audit: Reviewing procurement contracts to ensure you aren't overpaying for supplies.

3. Excise & Customs Advisory ​

  • Excise Duty: Precision in calculating duty on ex-factory price and managing EX-IM codes.
  • Bonded Warehouse: Setting up duty-free import mechanisms for raw materials used in export-oriented goods.
  • Duty Drawback: Assisting exporters in claiming refunds on import duties paid.

💊 Specialized Micro-Verticals ​

Pharmaceuticals ​

  • Expiry Management: Accounting for sales returns and expired stock destruction as per Drug Administration rules.
  • R&D Tax Credits: Claiming deductions for research and quality control expenses.
  • GMP Compliance: Ensuring financial records meet Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) audit standards.

Cold Storage & Agri-Processing ​

  • Subsidy Management: Facilitating government grants and interest-subsidized loans for agricultural infrastructure.
  • Seasonal Capital: Managing working capital limits during peak harvest seasons.

Brick Kilns & Traditional Industry ​

  • Labor Compliance: Managing piece-rate wages and seasonal labor contracts under the Labor Act.
  • Environmental Tax: Compliance with pollution control fees and local levies.

🏗️ Industrial Compliance ​

  • Labor Law Audit: Verifying compliance with minimum wage, overtime, and Social Security Fund (SSF) enrollment.
  • Environmental Audit: Reviewing the financial allocation for mandatory pollution control (EMP) and CSR.
  • Factory Act Compliance: Ensuring safety and health provisions are budgeted and met.

Is Your Factory Leaking Profit? ​

Our cost audit can find the 2% margin you're losing to inefficiency.

Schedule a Factory Visit
